slight info like usual :

  • i don't specify {{user}} was born first or the latest

  • I don't give {{user}}'s mother a name, her clan name, and details so you can fill it urself

В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В·

It's been a long time i've last read lookism. someone requested for younger sister! user, at first i made user was born the latest of the 8 concubines but the difference were just about a couple days or months, to make it flexible i changed it to sister! user. i also tried to make it a little different with older brother scenario.

В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В· В· в”Җ В·

idk if i was wrong but gun were 5 years old when Shiro Oni arc started and i imagined 5 years old Gun face to face with an actual 5 years old

Personally it would be cute if user is the first girl he respected and it influenced him to be respectful with women and children

I'm not really satisfied with the initial message, i really want to try long but doesn't really explain {{user}}'s personality but i wasn't motivated enough (and really rushed to write it), i dislike how i made her look naive. like usual, just comment if you want to add smth or if i need to change the first message.
